title: Wood & Magic [Fabric]
description: Play Vanilla+ Minecraft with Farm & Magic addons.
body:
## Wood & Magic | Fabric

Welcome, **traveler**, I'd hope you would like this modpack!

- ✨ **Magic**
  - Master the arcane arts with custom spells and magical abilities.
- 🌾**Crops**
  - Build and grow thriving farms to sustain your journey.
- 🌍 **Experience**
  - Venture into the unknown with RPG-inspired quests and expanded exploration mechanics.
- 🗺️ **World**
  - Discover hidden treasures, magical biomes, and mysterious dungeons waiting to be unraveled.
- ⚡ **Smoothness**
  - Optimized for a smooth experience, perfect for players seeking a magical vanilla+ feel.
- 😄 **Server Pack**
  - Play with your friends with a [**Server Pack**](https://ko-fi.com/s/78d9487e6b)!


### Custom keybinds! [0.0.9+]
 - Due to nature of many mods installed, some mods overwrite important keybinds!
- Here is the list of changed keybinds:
  - Zoom [**C**]
  - Open backpack [**B**]
  - Speak [**V**]
  - Mute/Unmute mic. [**Right shift button**] [**Reference image**](https://www.google.com/search?sca_esv=4fbe7c869920a6f3&sxsrf=ADLYWIKaYaSONIIwPBGYJqlPDOZC7rU5GQ:1736779535847&q=Right+shift+button&udm=2&fbs=AEQNm0Aa4sjWe7Rqy32pFwRj0UkWd8nbOJfsBGGB5IQQO6L3JyJJclJuzBPl12qJyPx7ESJehObpS5jg6J88CCM-RK72sNV8xvbUxy-SoOtM-WmPLIjZzuRzEJJ0u2V8OeDS2QzrFq0l6uL0u5ydk68vXkBqxln9Kbinx1HZnJEg4P6VfVQ98eE&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiR6aX69_KKAxXqHxAIHfdiA20QtKgLegQIHRAB&biw=1745&bih=828&dpr=1.1#vhid=-dH65WNX4eaAhM&vssid=mosaic)
  - VoiceChat Settings [**Back slash button**] [**Reference image**](https://www.google.com/search?sca_esv=4fbe7c869920a6f3&sxsrf=ADLYWILExqvpngViusGoRnFRYTR-Qp0inQ:1736779762770&q=Back+slash+button&udm=2&fbs=AEQNm0Aa4sjWe7Rqy32pFwRj0UkWd8nbOJfsBGGB5IQQO6L3JyJJclJuzBPl12qJyPx7ESJehObpS5jg6J88CCM-RK72sNV8xvbUxy-SoOtM-WmPLIjZzuRzEJJ0u2V8OeDS2QzrFq0l6uL0u5ydk68vXkBqxln9Kbinx1HZnJEg4P6VfVQ98eE&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjplMDm-PKKAxWlJxAIHZMRK9sQtKgLegQIPRAB&biw=1745&bih=828&dpr=1.1#vhid=OXnn_hPho7lv3M&vssid=mosaic)
  - Sort items in a container/inventory [**Middle mouse button**]
  - Toggle sail [**U**]
- ❗ If some of the keybinds doesn't work, please check the keybinds settings!

### Caution!
Modpack version 0.0.9 has external disabled mods. DO **NOT** **enable** them!
